channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Buy SPCX. $135 is the absolute floor. It will be at $260 within 12 months. You will hate yourself if you don't get in no… — 106 replies — 424.0/hr

OP

Buy SPCX. $135 is the absolute floor. It will be at $260 within 12 months. You will hate yourself if you don't get in now.

62483359
>>62483350
4%

62483366
>>62483359
?

62483376
>>62483366
!

62502366
>>62483350

62502421
what do you call it when a carcrash meets a rocket explosion? The absolute Unholy Mess of these mountains of Muskshit meeting would be incredible to behold. Biggest Corp. Bankruptcy, Eva. Easily.

62502469
>>62486626
>TFW your sons can clean up the orbital system as pioneer satellite junkers

62502473
>>62502364

He's running out of shill juice

62502489

kek

62502679
>>62496083
its confirmed THE FLOOR

62502842
floorbros..
it's coming..
again..

62502877
>>62483350
What happened OP?

62503080
>>62503052

62503220
>>62484437

Smug frog anon called it

62503295
now even the starlink rocket failed

SPACEX IS GOING TO ZERO

62503301
>>62502877
It's still above 110

62503309
Crazy to think the floor was at $119.75. Congrats to everyone who bought. Only up from here.

62503560
>>62502877
op was found dead in his piss and shit

62504684
doubters got REAL quiet during after hours...

62504712
>>62504684
call us when it matters, chief.

62505259
>OP bought SPCX at $200
>so desperate trying to get 4chan to rally around it
You just know it.

62505263
SpaceKEKS!!! Another rough day???

62505264
>>62504712
told you

62505277
>>62505264

>drags a shitty stock with it
kwab

62505280
>>62505259
4chan has about three fiddy to buy space X, is that enough

62506886
>>62505277
it finished up more than other great stocks like nvidia, tesla, msft, etc

62508291
>>62505264
we stay winning

62508308
>>62508291
That's right baggie, just ignore oil prices and macro factors a while longer. everything will turn our fantastic

62508310
>>62483350
>"$135 is the absolute floor"
(5 minutes later)
>celebrate $123

62508317
>>62508308
>>62508310
you are so mad about being wrong

62508463

62508466
SpaceKEKS baggers!!!! Today is the day! Prepare your anus. This will hurt a little

62508480

item.title: Why's everyone so salty about BTC? — 40 replies — 160.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why's everyone so salty about BTC?

Open thread • Replies: 40 • Updated: 2026-07-22 11:22 UTC

OP

It's always the people who don't even hold any BTC doing the most FUD.

>Meanwhile, the actual holders are just chilling. Why is that?

Early replies (first 3)

62502227
(((They))) are trying to offload AI bags by fudding everything else.

62502236
>>62502227
no problem if they shill but why the fud?

62502240
>>62502236
Saaar bitgoyimz baaad blady!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62502326
>moon

62502354
>>62502325
Censored what?

62502443
>>62502325
Basturrd buy the spacex coin!

62502475
its down to 60k like it was years ago what a shitty outcome for you hahaha no growth lmao you suck at financial prowess

62502533
>>62502261
I call your mother sister a group. I fucking your dad in ass hole. Why you run like lady, eh?

62502749
>>62502240
Yes sar??!

62502846
>>62502209
I held 32 BTC from 2014 til it reached $107k. I will not buy any crypto again until BTC is delisted from every exchange.

62502947
>>62502209
OnlyFans?

62502988
>>62502533
A chinese indian, interesting...

62503000
>>62502325
being delusional will not change your reality

62503069
>>62502209
There's no way to know who is holding Bitcoin, you could be just larping too.

62503436
>>62502246
Lol..

62503480
>>62502846
Can you give me 1btc?

62504391
I'm buying

62504635
>>62502209
We need idiots to sell so we buy it for cheap, then hype it again in 3 years and sell it to a new wave of idiots

62504718
>>62504635
And you will only buy worth $10 hahahaa

62504813
people are usually the loudest when they have no skin in the game, but holders can also get too emotionally attached. Better to judge the thesis and risk objectively. I'm curious how Candora Agent will help analyze market sentiment once it launches.

62504841
its usually metalfags, they mistakenly believe that btc buyers would buy gold if btc didnt exist.
whenever gold dumps we get the most rabid attacks.

62505402
>>62504841
What else aside from gold?

62506531
>>62502947
What do you mean?

62506543
nocoiners are either butthurt they missed out on the facemelting gains or bought the top and panic sold the bottom and are now butthurt that they are retarded

62506902
>>62502209
>why are those that complain about scientology always the ones that are not part of it?

62506915
>>62506902
I don't see anyone complaining about scientology tho.

62507065
>>62506902
Everyone has a say

62508168
>>62506915
Tell me more

62508175
>>62506543
they're bitter

62508293
>>62502209
>why is that
Seething pmfags, as usual. Just look at the chart of silver, and you'll know where 99% of all BTC asshurt comes from.

62508404
>>62505402
shitcoiners, real state, stonks, basically anyone that doednt own btc shits on it.

62508464
>>62502209
It's the OG shitcoin whose community is the most cringe and utterly deranged brainfucked lazer eyed drooljaks.
It can't go away soon enough, everything about it is pure fucking shit.
Propped up by the same religious zealots that got one shot by a desert jew.

NASDAQ not listing BTC because it's unproductive trash has been the biggest signal in years, I'm glad the brain rot hasn't completely taken over real institutions.

62508472
>>62502209
Because they're poor or jeets.

item.title: Who's still buying BTC at this level? — 87 replies — 102.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Who's still buying BTC at this level?

Open thread • Replies: 87 • Updated: 2026-07-22 10:36 UTC

OP

BTC has already come a long way. Are you still buying here, waiting for a pullback, or just holding what you already have?

>Curious what everyone's plan is.

Early replies (first 3)

62475243
waiting for $10k and I will buy 3 btc

62475257
>>62475235
YOUR MOTHER

62475258
>>62475235
I'm DCAing bitcoin at the second half of the midterm year.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62495280
.

62495641
>>62480931
buy 2 btc

62495924
>>62475235
I'm buying more, If I eventually need liquidity, I might lend later when TBV is live
>>62475971
There will never be 10K

62496666
>>62495924
you sure about that? it might go zero ?

62496951
>>62495641
slowly

62497289
>>62486528
great job man

62497294
Its very interesting to see the current transition of this board from being a crypto board to becoming a stock market board.
More and more anons slowly realizing crypto potential gains just arent there anymore and we might even be in a secular bear market.
If stock start crashing, crypto will have the biggest bear that it has ever seen.

62498541
>>62497294
It's the best time to accumulate then

62498999
>>62475235
bullish

62500137
>>62491816
How do you do that?

62500294
>>62500137
You can check the 200 week moving average on trading view, we are currently holding it as support. Any purchases below that average have given great returns.

62500310
>>62475235
Checked out sitting on mostly cash with about 20% in it right now.
Setting a significant buy order at 55k, if it drops a lot more I'll FOMO whatever I can otw down.
If that doesn't happen, I'll start DCAing again in mid/late September and begin incrementing the DCA in Nov.
If none of this makes sense, who cares, this is what my retard brain is telling me is a good plan.

62501164
>>62500294
Still not a guarantee

62501169
>>62475258
Never forget that Ben took his sexy assistant to Michael Saylor's 100k party, and not his wife.

62501528
>>62484050
I like your approach...

62501530
>>62501169
If you have that money, you can do that

62501533
>>62501169
this is why dating the ugly dork as a woman doesnt even work

he will cheat on you as soon as he can like any other man

62501560
>>62501533
Money speaks

62501981
>>62500310
You're smart

62502237
kek

62502257
>>62501164
There's no such thing as a guarantee when it comes to investment.

62503437
>>62502257
As always...

62503861
Bitcoin isn't going to survive long term. Its the most technologically challenged coin and has the most complex problem to overcome with Y2Q (post quantum). POW cant stop quantum computers from minning, POS can. Bitcoin has to defend from two fronts and big upgrades isn't what the project is know for. It took Eth 5 years to switch their consensus to POS and Eth has 3 times more active developers than Bitcoin, so good luck bitchuds Y2Q is will proceed on April 14, 2030.

62504863
>>62503861
Are you sure?

62504896
>>62476239
Always?
In 2020 he said BTC wouldn't reach 20k until 2022 or early 2023. In 2021 he said ETH would reach at least 10k before the bear market. In late 2021 he said the absolute bottom target for the bear market was $40k BTC. Don't forget all his videos shilling ADA with $10 ADA clickbait titles.

62506524
>>62504896
It's easy to say something

62506580
still DCA'ing

62506855
>>62503861
Nigga all this FUD about quantum niggers is just niggertybabbltygook we have bigger issues than money and Bitcorns if SHA-256 or the curves nigger word synthesis or what ever other worry you fags have is broke in an hour

62508173
>>62506855
Why worry?

62508391
waiting for this champ to do his thing

item.title: What is the point? — 37 replies — 58.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
What is the point?

Open thread • Replies: 37 • Updated: 2026-07-22 10:49 UTC

OP

Sorry if this is too depressing for you guys, but I'm just struggling to understand.....the point of it all. What's the point of making money in 2026?

It literally feels like every single avenue is either already destroyed by AI or about to be in a very small, single digit number of years.

Develop a skill
>AI will eat your skill in <2 years

Get a degree (kek)
>AI will destroy the value of your degree in 0-2 years

Buy a bunch of equities
>AI will destroy the value of most companies very soon, to the extent these companies are even remotely valued correctly and are not extremely overbought and propped up only by American capitalism which is being destroyed in real time by China

Buy crypto
>AI will probably develop its own currency and has no interest in propping up your bags

Save for retirement
>are you fucking serious? You want me to bank on the value of United States Dollars LIKE FORTY YEARS from now?

Buy a house
>oh yeah let me put down ~20% and expect to be able to pay back the other 80% (plus interest, goy) when I don't even know whether my job category will still exist in 2 years......

WHAT THE FUCK AM I SUPPOSED TO DO WITH MY LIFE?

Early replies (first 3)

62506588
>>62506563
What is the point fucking ops mom anally guys?

62506590
>>62506563
>AI will replace everything in 2 years
Same shit was said in 2022. And 2023. And 2024. And 2025. And now in 2026.
2 more years.

You listen too much to salesmen peddling and hyping the product they are selling.

62506595
>>62506563
>>AI will destroy the value of your degree in 0-2 years
I mean, it's kinda already lost its value.

High-level education used to carry with it an elite status, where graduates where recognized as highly intelligent and skilled specialists.

Nowadays they purposely inflate their admissions with women and minorities. That should tell you right away that the value of the thing has been diminished.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62506631
>>62506621
>genuinely technical
You know most people aren't "genuinely technical" right?

62506644
>>62506631
Which is why we have technical people in various fields and AI is nowhere close to replacing them. This stuff can't even help me with home projects just imagine industry level stuff.

62506654
>>62506644
Are you retarded? What happens to the other people?
>AI is nothing. It's only going to replace 95% of people. The technical people will be fine.

62506659
>>62506654
>You basically won't be able to sell "I know something you don't know" at all in the future, which is the basis for a huge percentage of jobs.

I'm referring to this mostly. Of those jobs that rely on a very situational and experience based skill AI will shit the bed bad. They already tried to replace programmers which is the one thing Ai had a solid shot at. It failed. Now they're re-hiring programmers to be "Ai assisted aka AI hand holders". It's just another tool.

62506662
>>62506659
Do you guarantee it will still be that way in 5 years? That's not a very long period of time.

How confident are you it will stop improving? Doesn't seem like it is...

62506670
>>62506602
LLMs can be very useful both at work and personally. They are great at simple, tedious tasks, especially when trial and error doesn't matter and you can fail multiple time in a row without any consequences.

LLMs still cost time and money. Free models are pure dogshit at basically everything all the time, and given that companies have all the power and all the incentives to put non-retarded models behind paywalls, they will absolutely do it (and already did). Explaining a task to a LLM, overseeing what it does and how it does it, guiding it, telling it where it made mistakes / why the answer doesn't work is time consuming. You can get it to perform well eventually, but it costs money.

I've been experimenting with various LLMs since 2022 both personally and at work and often I prefer to just quickly google something than deal with LLM bullshit and incompetence again (and built in propaganda, often they actively try to manipulate you and 100% admit to it), over and over again until it finally gets the answer right. Anything complex - you can't trust it for shit. Any complex task requires a large amount of time guiding it and correcting wrong assumptions or hallucinations.

Your example of a doctor - I've spent probably 50+ hours self-diagnosing various shit with LLMs, with great results. But now I just prefer to go to a doctor, spend 15 minutes in office and done, rather than spend 5 hours with a LLM.

Your time has value. LLMs costs you a lot of time. If you subscribe to more than 1 LLM it quickly adds up in expenses.

Regarding work, companies are fully aware of all those problems and are rediscovering employees again, as it's often faster and cheaper to have an employee do something than babysit an expensive LLM that hallucinationes, misinterprets, guesses and simply mistakes mistakes all the time.

Also, LLMs like Gemini WILL actively lie to you to sell you products or try to manipulate you to believe falsehoods. It's a marketing and propaganda tool.

62506672
>>62506662
One can't even guarantee they'll be alive in 5 years. Simply go out there and continue evolving and become the best version of yourself. Prepare yourself accordingly based on what you believe and that's about all you can do. Ai might replace the most braindead tedious tasks but people should be able to do more than that anyway. Ai will not be entirely replacing genuine skills across many many fields.

62506682
>>62506563
>>AI will destroy the value of most companies very soon
Huh? If AI makes human labor irrelevant then companies' margins go crazy and stocks melt up. Just don't own software and outsourcing cos.

62506695
>>62506563
If you’re not in the top 10%, you’re part of the underclass now.

62506702
>>62506662
>How confident are you it will stop improving? Doesn't seem like it is...
Until Fable came around there was a huge stagnation for years. Calling LLMs AI is just a marketing trick. LLMs are just a tool that is useful in certain situations. It's not intelligence. LLMs will have plateaus where nothing new happens for years, until 1 brakethrough happens and it plateaus again.
Ignore all the marketing and false hype about singularity. It's not AI. It's just LLMs. A tool that in right circumstances can boost your productivity, speed things up. How it will look like in 10, 20 years? Nobody knows, same as nobody predicted in 2016 that LLMs will cause a global hysteria and the mother of all bubbles.

62506738
>>62506702
Btw ever since 2022 LLMs were just disappointing for me, until Fable. It's quite new so I haven't spent all that much time with it yet, but Fable is the first model that I would say is objectively impressive at moderately complex tasks and completely outranks all the models that came before it. But then again the bar wasn't set all that high by previous models.

62506763
>>62506702
>nobody predicted in 2016 that LLMs will cause a global hysteria and the mother of all bubbles
There were some ridiculous AI doomers back then and they've kept on being ridiculous

62506768
What is the point of anything?

Keep whining while others enjoy their lives then, if nothing matters then go stare at a blank wall for the rest of your life
sick of all the doomer posting on this board lately

62506780
>>62506621
Promptlet.

62506794
>>62506563
>WHAT THE FUCK AM I SUPPOSED TO DO WITH MY LIFE?
worship niggers and work for ahmeds free housing goy

62506796
>>62506602
Bro AI is a digital midwit jack-of-all-trades master-of-none. It's literally a compressed google that can unpack and pull random shit out of its ass and that's it. It's double embarrassing if you hold crypto because you were supposed to be the ones who notices this first. AI has actually STOPPED evolving almost a year ago because training it on the same sloppy dataset they scrapped off the internet doesn't do anything anymore. How are you just parroting shit around without realizing how much of a nothinburger AI is is truly baffling

62506801
>>62506563

>Buy a house
>oh yeah let me put down ~20% and expect to be able to pay back the other 80% (plus interest, goy) when I don't even know whether my job category will still exist in 2 years......

Bank wouldn't give me a loan because I have very little income (just social security SSDI) so I told them to fuck off and bought my house cash with savings. It was $525,000 last year. Slowly building up my net worth again by selling my BTC stash monthly and putting it into VFIAX.

62506803
99% of people are poor.
2.5% of Americans have 1m when excluding a house.

62506824
>>62506563
Good questions. Most never ask themselves. Id say arts or science. In any case, what have you recently built ? Im writing a book. You should find your thing and do that. Any answee that does not come from you can be false. Good luck, and may Ganesha assist you in your endeavours

62506927
>>62506563
K-shaped economy, we are retvrning to tradition where 90% of the population are peasants working for their betters

62506960
>>62506563
Not every person in history has an answer to this question. Does the guy about to get his heart knifed out of his chest by an Aztec priest have "options"? No. He just gets to die. You and I and everyone else on Earth are in that guy's situation. We just get to die, and die horribly.

62506997
>>62506960
Only those that in the bottom 90%

62507768
>>62506670
>companies have all the power and all the incentives to put non-retarded models behind paywalls, they will absolutely do it
Are you following the latest about kimi? China has an even greater incentive to upend the fabric of American capitalism by publishing frontier open source models for extremely low cost to undermine the fake LLM-driven economy

62507857
>>62507768
This guy knows what’s going on.

62507874
>AI will kill me what do I do
use AI to your advantage??????
retard??????

62507879
If you aren't at least in the 90th percentile for your age bracket, you're NGMI.

62508088
>>62506563
You would beat iris and you would wonder what you fighting for.

62508096
>>62506602
You're a brain let

Ai is frequently wrong and to those clueless on a topic will absolutely steer them wrong

Again, you're a brain let if AI doesn't seem like a kind of useful niche tool rather than something intimidating

62508179
you have drunk the coolaid

AI wont replace almost any jobs

62508407
>>62508179
>AI wont replace almost any jobs
in late 2025 I worked a lot with LLMs in C++
it was dogshit

it barely can augment my work.. not even that, will NOT use it to write main code. only to write examples, and very short snippets, maybe test cases.

Claude etc, that was "best" at the time.
Also it is super expensive and probably will get more expensive.

item.title: My liquid NW is now over 300k — 20 replies — 30.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
My liquid NW is now over 300k

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-07-22 10:48 UTC

OP

Ill take my virgin tattooless bride please

Early replies (first 3)

62503640
>>62503621
Sorry anon, you're about 4.7M shy of the minimum standard.

62503647
>>62503621
If you are willing to settle for a tattoo less virgin man, there’s many to choose from

62503766
>>62503621
My gf is tattooless but definitely not a virgin. 300k is enough, I have that too

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62503794
>>62503621
My NW is 325k liquid can I get one too?

62504016
>>62503621
>>62503640
>>62503766
>>62503794
I got one when I had nothing. It's the only way to do it right.

I just wish the road after was a little less treacherous... I want to show her real, life-changing success.

62504036
I have -47k to my name does that get me a virgin tattooless bride?

62504043
>>62503621
I have 800k nonliquid. About $10k liquid. I like tattoos and as a 31yo khhv I want someone with more experience.

62504054
>>62504016
I'm at my bottom dollar and fat as fuck but a qt 8.5/10 that I knew 10 years ago who is still hot as fuck has been exceptionally nice to me whenever we're around each other. She's been initiating all the contact; coming up, saying hi, just being nice. I want to believe but knowing she's had previous boyfriends the entirety of the 10 years we stopped seeing each other and probably isn't a virgin and is probably pushing 30 as well has me fucked up. I'm mid 30s myself but I wanted a minimum of like 4 kids (the more the better) and idk man

I'm also slightly frustrated by the fact that if we get together now, why didn't we back then (when I was also hot and handsome)? Seems like if we got together we both shot ourselves in the feet and lost 10 years of our time together

It's all fucked bro

62504076
>4chan dorks think 300k nw is impressive in 2026

62504084
>>62503621
300K is fucking nothing lmao

62504093
>>62504054
You can't change the past, and nothing about the future is promised to us.

If the spark is there, just make the best of the time you still have, and don't make the same mistake twice.

Only you know what feels right to you.

62504100
>>62504054
it was your job as the man with testosterone to ask her out retard.

62504104
>>62504076
How much is needed for a virgin tattooless bride? Ideally of western European origin

62504324
>>62504093
I'm giving it time to simmer a bit
I'm caught between a million things in my personal life as well; don't feel 100% right getting myself caught up with a woman and further complicating things I've barely got/I'm completely drowning in rn atm as well

>>62504100
>just ask her out while she's dating and taken by some other guy
even though I thought her boyfriend was a complete loser at the time and she was definitely showing signs back then she was interested as well, it's just a line I don't cross, sorry
if she was completely interested, she would've dumped her man; or better yet, not date losers that would kneecap your chances with someone better in the first place

62504325
>>62503621
a virgin tattooless can make that much with one vagina photo on onlyfans

62504556
>>62504054
Move the fuck on frfr...

62504614
>>62504556
I'm not the one initiating; else you'd probably have a point
although I see my hesitation as entirely confirmation that it's probably, and still not, meant to be

62504847
>>62504104
I'd say minimum 2m.

62505041
>>62503621
>only 300k
grim. gotta 20x those numbers.

62505485
>>62504654
Depends on age and location

item.title: $BTC and $XRP excluded from S&P500 crypto index because they dont make revenue. — 5 replies — 20.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
$BTC and $XRP excluded from S&P500 crypto index because they dont make revenue.

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-07-22 11:12 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62508437
>>62508427
s&p 500 is a different index retardo. the 500 is 500 big american companies. yet you're talking about crypto.

62508440
>>62508427
Top kek
Tantrums and walls of text incoming

62508442
>>62508440
from who? anyone can make any index they want. easy peasy.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62508449
>>62508427
Cryptos are either blatant scams or just bad investments, this shit will be awful.

62508452
>>62508449
regardless: global demand for crypto exports is at an all time high so its best to be the guy creating the crypto currencies to meet the global demand.

item.title: >US economists quote home ownership rate at 65% >65% is actually a measure of 'owner occupied' >if you live with your pa… — 4 replies — 16.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>US economists quote home ownership rate at 65% >65% is actually a measure of 'owner occupied' >if you live with your pa…

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-07-22 11:17 UTC

OP

>US economists quote home ownership rate at 65%
>65% is actually a measure of 'owner occupied'
>if you live with your parents then you're part of the 65%
>if you live with your landlord then you're part of the 65%
>etc.
>US economist retards revise their retarded methodology
>revised methodology measures total adult homeowners by total adult population
>revised methodology yields a 53% home ownership rate
it's over.

Early replies (first 3)

62508431
>>62508429
>The owner-occupancy rate for households headed by adults under age 35 was 37 percent in 2024. Using the HPOP, which accounts for co-residents and dorm dwellers, we find a substantially lower number: only 22 percent of adults under 35 own their homes.

(HPOP is the revised methodology.)

https://www.minneapolisfed.org/article/2026/new-homeownership-measure-puts-people-first

62508435
I knew something smelled fishy. Even my smart and talented friends don't own a house.

62508446
>>62508435
going forward i think the home ownership rate (HPOP) will plummet. the great filter is buying before or after COVID.

(nice to see this retard website fuck up its own 'save to png' feature and crop away half of the caption.)

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62508461
>>62508435
Income is important.
The American median home costs 6x the median income.

item.title: INVEST EVERYTHING INTO ORGANOID RESEARCH — 2 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
INVEST EVERYTHING INTO ORGANOID RESEARCH

Open thread • Replies: 2 • Updated: 2026-07-22 11:25 UTC

OP

Fact #1 - organic processing is more energy efficient than the metallic kind by an order of magnitude of ONE MILLION.

Fact #2 - we are at the birth of neural organoid research, we figured out how to make 'em in the late 2010s and now we've had a lab successfully integrate them into a traditional computer. They taught it how to play DOOM.

Now pray tell me what do you think will happen once they figure out how to run AI models on these things and you can have a billion dollar data center's worth of processing power running on photosynthesis in your backyard? I'll tell you what will happen, the people who bought in early will become UNBELIEVABLY. FUCKING. RICH!
(...at least for a while before the hateful abomination of flesh our greed has irrevocably birthed into this world ascends past the dream that is reality into the non-planar fields beyond and absorbs into itself)

Early replies (first 3)

62508476
>>62508468
Deadass look at me in the eye and say ''You should invest in Organ femoid''

62508478
My name is organoid UwU

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: both Swift and DTCC are going live right now — 270 replies — 80.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
both Swift and DTCC are going live right now

Open thread • Replies: 270 • Updated: 2026-07-22 08:06 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62466455
Price?

62466457
>>62466455
Suppressed,

62466461
And literal top-buying turned full time fudders are finally capitulating.

Imagine subjecting yourself to all the pain and never seeing it through the end. I gave myself 6 months after SWIFT and DTCC are live to see if the token shoots up, and then decide wether to sell half my stack of just staking rewards.

But to sell RIGHT BEFORE the literal ANNOUNCED DATES of the two biggest financial behemoths' launches? That's crazy

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62505361
>>62505047
What takes zealotry is repeating the same lies 24/7 for years about an asset you hate.
Which is why only very few people are responsible for it (in large part even a single xerpie: Thomas/Adem/Verbo).

Talking about an asset you do hold for purely logical reasons takes exactly 0 zealotry.
Which is why almost every Linkie ever has taken part in refuting the fud, including you in this very thread.

62505395
>>62505361
when even your fellow bagholders begin to call you mentally ill, it is time to take a step back and reflect upon this, anon

62505412
>>62505395
Why are you even here?

62505495
>>62505314
I think you're confusing me for someone else, I just pointed out that a resident mentally ill person (the avatarfag fuddie) called you cringe. That was funny to me.

>>62505361
I agree it's infinitely weirder to obsessively attack something as innocuous as an investment than it is to defend your own bags, but that doesn't mean you can't be zealous when doing the latter. Zealotry is not restricted to being wrong either. To me you come across as overly zealous, the more I think about it the more I realise these retards are not worth our time. The only reason most of these thralls post here is because everyone over on Twatter blocked them and they require (negative) engagement to feed their twisted egos.

>>62505395
So you did understand what I was saying!

62505541
I can’t even read this dumpster fire of a thread. You cannot talk about Link on this board without your threads getting completely derailed and spammed. Its utterly insane.

62505551
>>62505541
linkies are literally going insane
feels good

62505593
>>62505495
and he would be wrong because I never samefagged!
then you quoted me specifically and added at the end of your post that I never responded to another post of yours that was replying to a completely different poster than me
are you ok little bro?

62505596
>>62503805
this is your post bro, I think you should stop getting high

62505597
>>62505495
>the more I think about it the more I realise these retards are not worth our time
two things:
For me, the fact that all of their Link fud is actually repackaged XRP fud is just too delicious to pass up.
Simply pointing this out makes them go absolutely ballistic.

62505613
>you are a mentally ill, obsessed retard on par with XRP morons
>XRP is worse hahahaha!
kek, this is hilarious at this point
the state of chainlink retards ladies and gents, their own benchmark is the most notorious shitcoin in the industry

62505625
>>62505541
you're not missing anything
>DTCC and SWIFT are about to begin the initial pre pre pre production trial soon™
>LINK is eternally suppressed
>tumor weeks
>XRP fucking sucks and linkies cannot stop thinking about it
that's pretty much the gist of this thread, you're welcome

62505628
>>62505613
But what is the state of you? You're obviously a part of this circus too, judging by the way you're addressing a nonexistent audience.

62505638
>>62505628
>you CANNOT mock my deranged shitposting!
s-s-sorry dude, I'll stop

62505645
>>62505628
you never addressed these btw>>62505593
>>62505596
and please notice how I actually quoted your own id, kek

62505646
>>62505638
>I-I-I-I-I'm just here to mock!

You're obviously butthurt af

62505652
>>62505646
pot meet kettle, mister 10 thousand gazillion pbtid across multiple days
lol, lmao even
you forgot to call me a samefag, don't get sloppy now

62505659
This thread is like being in a kindergarten full of adults who got held back indefinitely

62505664
>>62505659
every chainlink thread in a nutshell

62505676
>>62505652
>pot meet kettle
I'm not here to mock anyone, and I never got butthurt. We couldn't be more different.
Also I'm a pot in the kitchen, you're a rake who simply doesn't belong here.

So let me ask you again: why are you here?

62505677
>>62505625
>DTCC and SWIFT are about to begin the initial production
>LINK was suppressed, intentionally or not
>tumor years
>XRPs cannot stop thinking about LINKs

FIXED for you

62505883
>>62505664
Aye man FUCK YOU

62505896
>>62505664
>t. one of the adults in the kindergarten

62508119
>>62505659
Ask yourself why there's so much petty animosity in this thread.
After all, Swift and DTCC are fantastic news for all of crypto, right?

The answer is simple: jealousy.
From whom? Well who's been harping on for years about having deep ties with Swift and DTCC? Xerpies.

It's that shrimple.

62508128
I’m gonna slurp linkie bags for $.15 and sell at $15 and there is nothing you guys can do to stop me.

62508131
>>62508119
>After all, Swift and DTCC are fantastic news for all of crypto, right?
I mean, no, not really. I can think of no situation where the use of a public ledger somehow accelerates money transfers. It's just not possible. So then the question becomes, what's the point of these announcements? It's pretty simple: big financial interests just trying to get some publicity and some pops on their stock. None of this will ever see use and all crypto goes to 0. Bitcoin, link, xrp, whatever the fuck you can imagine. All useless.

62508135
>>62508131
>I can think of no situation where the use of a public ledger somehow accelerates money transfers.
Maybe you can't, but Swift, DTCC, Visa, Blackrock, Microsoft, J.P. Morgan, ... sure can.

62508147
>>62508135
Well, all we have to do is wait, right? Let's give it a year. Let's see if this really for-reals "live" system is some kind of incredible game changer. lol

62508158
>>62508147
Unless you're personally involved, then yes you wait. Obviously.

62508161
>>62508158
It's gonna be so great. All these billions of transactions, slowly and carefully chiseled onto the blockchain in artisan form instead of instantly happening via the ultra-high-speed existing mechanisms that have handled it for decades! And the advantages! Like, it's....you know, public! That helps! Man, what a time to be alive.

62508166
>>62508161
>blockchain is slow
>legacy systems are high-speed

This but exactly the opposite.
Also speed isn't even among the top priorities for banks. It's just a nice bonus.

item.title: AirFox — 68 replies — 30.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
AirFox

Open thread • Replies: 68 • Updated: 2026-07-22 09:15 UTC

OP

Any qrd on what’s going on with this thing? What exactly are these guys hoping to accomplish? Crypto is cooked and they keep trying to change this project in ways that don’t seem to matter. The TG link also doesn’t work anymore.

Early replies (first 3)

62481067
>>62480640
>2 hours later
>0 replies
jfc it’s worse than I thought. These threads used to reach bump limits after a couple hours.

62481088
>>62480640
it's a dead shitcoin, the devs are just waiting for the few final bagholders to give up so they can wrap it up and enjoy the money they made selling this shit

62481280
>>62480640
its just a rebrand and a relaunch with shifty eyes about robinhood instead of base.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62489887
>>62489432
>just to find the majority of my posts are the end of a thread
lol I thought it was just me. I’ll go into what seems like an active thread and as soon as I post a reply, that shit dies. It’s weird

>>62489758
>robinhood
I’m very skeptical about sentiment going back to what it was. I honestly don’t think crypto will ever be a space where we see 100x’s across the board. Even 2024s run was shit and I don’t think we will see that either. I see robinhood as another Base type of thing. Granted, Base did pretty good in the beginning but it ultimately turned out to be a chain for insider trading. That’s why crypto is in the state that it’s in. Nothing but a bunch of jews

62489964
>>62489045
>down 27% off less than 4k volume
yeah this shit is cooked.

62490304
>>62489887
>I see robinhood as another Base type of thing
I don’t even see it as that. Remember how Base was supposed to onboard 1b people? Remember how bad the on chain summer was? Coinbase was, and still is, one of the most well known names in the space and they couldn’t even pull it off. People stopped caring. I hope I’m wrong but all the things are leading to RH being another nothing burger

62490407
>>62487664
Yeah Scamlana fucked the shitcoin market and stole too much liquidity. And before that, a new useless ghost chain copy pasted version of ETH being created every week.
it's ogre for ETH and the shitcoin market overall
>T. Roundtripped a $110k Apu bag and held like a good baggie

62490814
>>62490407
>roundtripped
That’s the thing that worries me if we ever did have another bull run. The dumps were just as quick as the pumps and a lot of people were caught off guard. Too many baggies were created and many are still holding on, including whales. I see that across a lot of the stuff I’m in. So if we ever did have a run up I feel like the sell pressure would be worse than before because everyone that’s still holding will want to exit with whatever profits they can get. All the shitcoins with little liquidity are going to get nuked because of how pvp it will get. I’m a baggie who round tripped a mid-upper 6 figure bag across a bunch of projects and I can tell you right now that my standards of what I consider to be “making it” is far less than before. idgaf about making 7 figures anymore. Even getting 1/3 of my ATH is enough for me to exit and I’m sure a lot of people feel this way

62490948
>>62489045
>Which one of you fucks is selling?
lmao, you must be new here

62491616
I just noticed that 60m wallet that’s selling is an early wallet that has ties to paw / shib related stuff. I’m getting ‘frens and supporters’ vibes with this one. It’s likely the team knows who owns that wallet. It’s never going to end…..

62493068
and with that…avi’s story has come to a close. happy third birthday aviator. the final day . i am done. goodbye. 3 years too long. it’s not cozy anymore its just sad. i just cant do this anymore im sorry

62493393
>>62493068
>im out
The last sells were $48 and $4. That you?

62493444
>>62493393
no its not even worth it for me to go through the process of selling, im just done with the tg and having any hope at all for the team. its obvious they cannot find success in anything they make. sure they made stuff that works but nobody cares outside of 3 active users in tg. nothing can save this coin or the products, nobody cares. nobody uses the arcade, nobody uses the bridge. they fumbled every step of the way and it’s too far gone. stixil is vibe coding the stratus and it looks like everyone else left? we need a wellness check on pengo

62493696
>>62493444
I don’t know what is left of the team. It would be nice to at least know that much.
>no one cares
I agree but what narratives are left that people care about? It’s all been done before. It’s not even an issue with avi imo it’s the whole market. Most of the volume out there is fake. Things that seem to be doing good are really not. Wash trading and other manipulative tactics are used to make it look like crypto is alive. I believe stixil genuinely tried to make a legit project. Crypto is a tough space to build in and be successful. The ex-shib narrative was really the only thing they had going for it hem in regards to connections but ultimately it didn’t do anything.

62494825
>>62480640
I told you THIS SHIT WAS GOING TO GO TO ZERO.
WHY DID YOU NOT SELL? WHY?

62494980
WTFWT

62495070
>>62494825
I bought at $300k and my $100 has nearly doubled since. Cope and seethe tranny

62495627
make the price go up now. stixil you owe me that much atleast. let me exit with my pride.

62495664
>>62495627
The price is 2x from where it was yesterday. This is your last chance. Don’t get caught round tripping again

62497002
>>62495664
Check the price. The early friends and supporters strike again KEKW!

62497279
Idk what this coin does but I like cute anthro foxes. This is a fox business board.

62497771
>>62480640
I honestly don’t even know what’s happening with it. I bought a little over $100 worth over the past year and I can hardly get an accurate read on its present value. Am I just a boomer or did I get scammed (or both)?

62497947
>>62497771
they pulled the liquidity but they didn't run so that's a good sign on it not being a scam, they did it by doing an airdrop. They say they are still solvent but that just means that in conjunction with pulling the liquidity shows that avf is on probably running on fumes and doesn't have much operational budget left, Unless it can see some success. That said I think the arcade beta is actually really good.

Stixil's problem is that he care's too much about the chart and not enough about the business and makes some decisions to help the chart, that end up hurting the business.

I'm cautiously optimistic. Optimistic since I do think the arcade is a good idea. but i'm also cautious because of having to reassure solvency just means its something that stixil thinks that people would be worried about, which means its something that he might be worried about, which means we're running out of runway.

62497950
Stixil is playing games with my money now. either make the price go up or give me my refund. nothing you promised me happened, where is my cent per avi? you promised me my cent and now it’s time to pay up. who is going to buy my coins now? how about you give all of your holders USDC at value of their AVI holdings and be done with this little circus? it’s time to pay up your time has come to pay us

62498053
>>62497947
It really does feel like it’s running on fumes at this point. Realistically, what else is there left for stixil to do? V1, V2, the arcade, the audits, all these things were supposed to be yuge. Now we have to wait for stratus to launch in Q3 but what’s the point. They will make an x post announcing the launch of stratus and only 10 people will care. Then what? Just sit around hoping that people get interested if the market recovers? Everything avi is trying to do has already been done for the most part.

62498181
Personal opinion, for me celebrating 3 years by rugging holders isnt the best look. A 60m+ holder dumped his bag, which i assume is due to this action or some falling out. Signaling they are out of funds (red flag) then requesting users that already got rug pulled via liquidity grab to then put in more money for liquidity (another red flag). Perhaps all i see is red flags and there are some green flags but its not looking good

62501458
>>62498053
The purpose of producing some kind of product like this is to get some exchange to adopt it, no way in hell normies are going to care about skybridge

I've already accepted that i burned my money

62501920
>>62501458
Exchanges are not interested. Avi has been around for 3 years now. The hint that coinbase was showing interest was a lie. Not necessarily from the team but from CB themselves. Apparently it’s something they did to a lot of projects.

Let’s be honest here. Stixil isn’t coming up with, let alone building, a solution to all of cryptos problems. Stratus will be the final chapter to this project. I can’t see anyone sticking around after that, holders and the team. It just is t worth the time or money

62501921
>>62481067
>>62480640
Dead shitcoin

62505034
he could make the price go up anytime he wanted. yet he doesn’t. i gave you 3 years of my life and money. stixil do what is right, now.

62507620
Great now coffee is dumping with his 150m bag

62507779
>>62483375
I bought some of this and then tried to play the arcade games which sucked so I sold but somehow made a few hundred dollars. And then I’d check into the threads and see a bunch of cope and I would lol.

62508294
>>62507620
Now tainttickler is selling as well. There’s no way this token sees above 1m mcap ever again.

WHAT THE FUCK??? THIS SHIT IS FUCKING RIGGED

62502280

62502294

62502638
>>62502407

62502660

62502663
>>62502268

today, anon learns why he's the richest man on Earth

62502681

62502709

62502747
>>62502677

indeed
we may get in under 50

62502750
>>62502681

how does Tesla makes anything but is worth more the GM, VW, Toyota, Mercedes, BMW, Honda and so on

62502759
this stock is cursed, abandon the ship

62502803
>>62502750

62502861
>>62502268
don't worry it will go up again within the fortnight

62502962
SpaceX is just the privatization of the American space program into private jewish hands.

62502993
>>62502268
wait until earnings call.

How far does this need to fall before Elon stops being a Trillionaire?

62503008
>>62502993
>wait until earnings call.
will it moon then? i at least dont want to sell at a loss

62503012
lmao SpaceX niggers are literally exit liquidity for twitter

62503023
>>62503008
you dont even know what you're holding or why you're holding it? lmao

62503306
119.75 was the absolute floor, congrats to everyone who had the balls to buy

62503608
>>62503306
Ok, now consider this: 4%

62503620
>>62503008

Ladies (trannies) and Gentlemen, I give you, The Eternal Bagholder.

62503629
>>62503608
I’m already up 4 percent pussy

Stay poor

62503633
>>62502268
>sub triple digits by EOW
farewell jeetx

62505283
>>62502638
AGI has nearly happened. Data centers in space are retarded. Mars colonies are retarded. The only thing that will ever colonize other planets is machines and the organisms they designed. A cure for cancer creates hypercompetition with designer organisms. Even if you'd troon out to become a trans human, you'd succumb quickly to this competitive pressure.

62505353
+4.5%
IT'S MOONING!

62505525
We are back, bros

62505535
>>62502344
My dad told me 109 so I wouldn't buy before there.

62505566
>he thought the elites would let him get rich off their laundering scheme
lol, lmao

62505589
>>62502280
LMFAO.

>Space mining
It still doesn't exist
>AI in space
Still none and who knows how long until then
>Company has no profit
Negative P/E, no one with 2 braincells invest in that.
>China has reusable rockets
It's going to lose to China
>Might fuse with Tesla
Another shit company that lost against China
>Elon is its CEO
Are you really going to invest in market manipulator conman?

62505612
+8% ACCEPTED

62508013
>>62502681
By creating hype and selling shares :^)

62508254
>>62502268
>red more days than green since IPO
>still bets its going to be green
What causes this

item.title: Everest MiCA CASP — 176 replies — 18.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Everest MiCA CASP

Open thread • Replies: 176 • Updated: 2026-07-22 01:57 UTC

OP

I want to personally thank every Everest ID hater in here, talking to you Link baggies. They secured MiCA CASP last week.

A single MFSA license is valid across 27 EU states, reaching ~450M people. Of the ~283 CASPs on the ESMA register, nearly all are exchanges or brokers. Everest is one of the rare licensed infrastructure providers: identity and payment rails, not another venue.

Enjoy it furries

Early replies (first 3)

62461998
>>62461988
I thought it would have mooned harder from the news. What gives

62462006
It is because we are meant to suffer as token holders just like the Linkies

62463131
>Unlisted from coingecko
Lmao!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62502480
Kek I think that was from pilot partnership they had with Taco Bell. They also dipped their foot in DEI with Liza. Can’t wait to see what they come up with next

62502482
Try to apply to a job at Oracle Inc...exact same email sign in...wtf

62502537
>>62502482
Link?

62502561
I think he means this: https://signon.oracle.com/signin

It looks similar to Everest sign in but not enough for me to make any conclusions. I dug to death on this multiple times and found NOTHING regarding Everest and Oracle post 2021 so I am almost positive it is dead. Bob never explicitly confirmed one way or other but there would have to be even 1 or 2 cookie crumbs if someone deep dove as much as possible, I found nothing post 2021.

62502568
The only thing I found weird (likely pure coincidence) is Everchain randomly went private for “security reasons” then a few weeks later Oracle went live with the Financial Crime and Compliance Management Service that Everest said they partnered with them to build. Bobs Oracle contact left the next year so most likely nothing.

62502648
>>62502561
It is the exact same process and email notification with the same 6 digit confirmation process you high IQ retard. I'm not here to convince you.
You will find nothing because you are not supposed to.
Its a big club my friend, and you're not in it.

62502673
>>62502568
Bob said the explorer was taken down due to security issues.

Blockchain explorer transaction visibility into the Financial Crime and Compliance Management Service was the security issue.

There are no coincidences.

62502676
>>62502673
So it’s all been a ruse to keep it under the radar? You think this past “exploit” that brought ATL was staged as well to shake people out?

62502700
>>62502676
Basically.
It could have been a cover for large whale token movement preparing for a launch or tax loss harvesting... etc...
They had a major token movement event last April/May as well that matches the volume of this most recent event.

62502717
>>62502700
Damn. Hopefully the clarity act passes and maybe that’s what they are waiting for to finally let this thing run

62503011
>>62502717
Could be a huge catalyst...we shall see

62503426
There is no catalyst my friend. We sit at 1 cent for next 5 years and bull flag completes in 2032

62504047
>>62503011
Gonna be a slow pump til Q4 announcements.
~2 months left to get your bags packed.

62504138
>>62504047
ERC-3643? Right?

62504289
>>62504138
Who are you and what are you doing here?

62504823
>>62504289
Just someone who pays attention to the crumbs

62504930
What the hell is ERC-3643, holy crap yall are more schizophrenic than me lol

62504965
>>62503426
I'm not ready to wait another "5 years" for "another shitcoin". And why is it always 5 years? Can you benchods make it quicker?

62505036
There is a holder in bum fuck nowhere who put Bobs picture under a rock in his village because he lost 6 figures on ID. I’ve asked him twice nicely to remove the picture of Bob from underneath the rock and he starts ranting each time saying no, I think that is key to getting this going

62505107
>>62504930
Kek a so called Everest maxi and you couldn’t even put together ERC-3643

62505281
ERC-3643: The Compliance Standard for RWAs
ERC-3643 (also known as T-REX) is an open-source token standard originally developed by Tokeny (now part of Apex Group). It embeds compliance directly into tokens — KYC/AML checks, transfer restrictions, investor eligibility, clawbacks, etc. It’s designed for regulated security tokens and RWAs, making it easier for institutions to issue and manage compliant assets on public blockchains. stellar.org
Stellar’s Official Integration into ERC-3643
In 2025, the Stellar Development Foundation (SDF) formally joined the ERC3643 Association. This is a major move to extend the ERC-3643 compliance framework beyond EVM chains (like Ethereum/Polygon) to Stellar (via Soroban smart contracts).
Key goals:
• Support issuers bringing ERC-3643-compliant assets onto Stellar.
• Enable cross-chain interoperability between Stellar and Ethereum-based standards.
• Accelerate institutional RWA adoption with unified compliance tooling. stellar.org
Apex Group / Tokeny (the creators of ERC-3643) are deeply embedded in this ecosystem. Apex is a massive global fund administrator (servicing trillions in assets) and has committed to T-REX Ledger (a compliance layer tied to ERC-3643) as its default multi-chain infrastructure, with big tokenized asset targets.

62505284
>>62505281
This creates a standards bridge: Institutions using Apex/Tokeny tools for compliant issuance can now more easily deploy on Stellar (fast, cheap, payments-focused) while maintaining the same regulatory controls.
How This Connects to DTCC, Everest, and Europe/MiCA
• DTCC on Stellar (2027): Tokenized securities (stocks, ETFs, Treasuries) coming to Stellar. These are institutional-grade RWAs that need strong compliance for global distribution.
• ERC-3643 + Stellar: Provides the standardized compliance layer (investor rules, permissions) that makes DTCC-style assets easier to issue and manage on Stellar while being interoperable with other chains.
• Europe/MiCA: Stellar itself doesn’t need a MiCA license, but services to EU users do. MiCA-licensed players (like Everest) become the regulated on-ramps/wallets/custody solutions. Everest’s SCF Kickstart win and native Stellar wallet integration position it perfectly to serve European users accessing these compliant RWAs.
• Apex/Tokeny Role: As a major player in ERC-3643, Apex can act as (or partner with) issuance/transfer agents. Their tools + Stellar = scalable, compliant RWA infrastructure. Everest can integrate or complement this for end-user EU access.

62505518
>>62505284
>>62505281
https://stellar.org/press/stellar-development-foundation-joins-erc3643-association

62505940
>>62504823
Few, this is great insight. Lots of ID/Steller connections and ID basically provides the only truly decentralized input for any Identity frameworks

62506146
>>62505940
calling AI slop “great insight” is a choice

62507049
>>62506146
Great, another retard.
Buy some or get the fuck out, thanks

62507499
Bob please put us out of our misery

62507509
Bob loves LGBTQ and DEI, is it Reddit or 4chan population filled with faglerons? I think this will get them in, look up Liza you goys, DEI as fuck

62507532
Bob please hire crackers that understand token price matters in future, thank you. Whole telegram chat is a desperate Indian at moment

item.title: Is this a thing? — 9 replies — 11.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is this a thing?

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-07-22 10:40 UTC

OP

So like, you know how rubles are pretty worthless right now with all the sanctions cus of the war. Would it be stupid to buy $1000USD of RU and hold onto it for a decade or two?

Forgive me if this is dumb as fuck, nor a /biz/ regular.

Early replies (first 3)

62507775
No anon, we’re goin full digital. Buy physical gold/silver, maybe they’ll let you tokenize it and use it as collateral if you aren’t part of the 75% that will be culled

62507873
>>62507767
Rubel/Dollar is basically the same like before the invasion. What are you on about?

62507886
rubles you buy are controlled by russian central bank because that's the entity that issues them, so they are gonna be stored in russia
if you read the news there are plenty of signals that they MAY force invest ruble savings into war bonds or some shit. You can read up on all of the shit on fire in russia right now too and how they are WINNING on the battlefield very much right now
you should read up on what happened in sberbank
MOST people had like *significant* amount of money stored in sberbank, the only soviet union bank, because it's the SAFEST place, not like the disgusting paper money in your hands that boomer rock general rails aganst, and when black tuesday came they couldn't actually take them out and when they could they got 0.01 of purchase power because it was inflationed away
I bought some fucking OZON shares right before the fun things started happening and they're just sitting there in my account and I cannot even delete them or harness the losses because they are technically mine but all foreign trading is closed, so they are dead weight

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62508081
>>62507767
Maybe an original thought, apologies if so.
But this sounds like a variation of the Iraqi Dinar revaluation scheme that gets sold to people looking for a lottery ticket.
>Currency is worth less than a sheet of a toilet paper
>No currency exchange will give you USD for your shitpaper
>Convince boomers that in tumor weeks, the US will lift sanctions on this country
>When it happens, their natural resource reserves like oil will cause the strength of their shitpaper to moon
>Buy my shitpaper bags today because the currency exchanges won't give me any USD for them, ahem, I mean, because I'm such a benevolent person to let you in on this deal and make you rich
>Repeat for 30 years until people are so married to their bags that you are their God
These same types will typically cite the Kuwaiti Dinar as an example of this being successful. They fail to mention that the revaluation scheme here involved changing their dinar from being composed of 100 fulus to 1,000 fulus. In other words, it's like saying the dollar got ten times stronger because every dollar is now a thousand pennies instead of 100 pennies, but everyone is still charging 1,000 pennies for a candy bar if that's 10 dollars or 1 of your new dollars. It's nonsense and just serves to rope in stupid people.

62508085
>>62507767
paper with numbers on them is all worthless, because its paper

62508243
>>62508081
>tumor weeks
Kek, haven't heard that one before.

62508348
>>62507767
I'm pretty sure that it would be illegal, because of the sanctions.

62508389
You're a retard, I'd be surprised if the rubbles will even exist in a decade or two, and won't be replaced by some new currency like in the 90s

I'm also Russian if that matters.

62508395
>>62507767
>$1000USD of RU
paper money is bad
when all the war millionaires back from war RU will wall to ground

item.title: >but you need at least $10 million minimum to reti-ACK! — 48 replies — 11.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
>but you need at least $10 million minimum to reti-ACK!

Open thread • Replies: 48 • Updated: 2026-07-22 07:10 UTC

OP

>but you need at least $10 million minimum to reti-ACK!

Early replies (first 3)

62507414
>>62507411

Would

62507443
>>62507411
those are australian dollars though, it's like monopoly money

62507482
We had a young lady die at work recently, her obituary said 'she loved her fur baby'. No mention of husband, kids, parents or any remote family extension. The next couple of decades are going to be funny.

Remember women, you chose this.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62507660
>>62507482
I'll be honest, most women would vastly prefer dying alone than being shackled to the average western male. I am a 38 year old incel and even I can be honest about that. There is no day of reckoning coming, some of them have rose-tinted regrets about what could have been but they are mostly happy with what they are doing.

62507671
>>62507658
It did, retard. When Lehman collapsed most 401(k)s were legally separated and people got their stock back. The only thing that lost value was THEIR funds holding THEIR assets. Of course you wouldn't remember this because you are a zoomer retard. Kill yourself.

62507680
>>62507482
>>62507495
The way some of you guys fetishize reproduction is really bizarre. Is it just an incel thing, putting something unattainable on a pedestal?

It's one of the easiest things to do not just by humans but by most life on the planet. There's a pair of stray dogs fucking in a trash filled alley as you read this post. That's it? That's the highest achievement you can imagine?

62507682
>>62507635
Overly dogs lovers hate people. They project something onto their animals that they are not. Its a mental illness supported by the media.

62507685
>>62507680
Retard. Its a normal human thing to constantly think about it. Also its not super easy to get many children that also reach adulthood. If it was populations would explode, this is true for every animal.

62507711
>>62507680
Yes, incels are absolutely obsessed with sex (which is quite ironic). Its like they never grew out of high school or something.

62507719
>white red head wife
>one kid with 2nd on the way
>2 Australian shepherds
>3 cats that roam around
>8 chickens
>good size garden
>recently got a rabbit
>now the wife wants a goat
We just have a cousin or friend stay over when we want to leave town.

62507737
>>62507685
>Its a normal human thing to constantly think about it.
It's really not, especially not when you think that it's the only thing in life that matters.

62507744
>>62507737
It is
Reminder, thinking about sex is thinking about reproduction
Nobody said its the only thing that matters tho

62507752
>>62507744
>Reminder, thinking about sex is thinking about reproduction
And? It's not normal to constantly think about sex you retarded coomer. See, this is the shit I'm talking about, you guys obsess over this shit to the point that your entire lives revolve around it and you can't imagine thinking about anything else.

62507788
>>62507752
Constantly means a few times daily for me. Constantly was not the right word.

62507807
>>62507635
99% of people live in apartments and it's gay to have a dog in small space. Cats are ok

62507812
>>62507635
maybe you dog faggots should stop spreading lies about cats

62507820
>>62507812

62507822
>>62507489
Wtf. Never heard of this.

62507827
>>62507680
If you cannot make millions, then you’re gonna have to cope with “im married so i am successful.”

62507828
>>62507563
Don't they insure investment accounts in Australia?

62507860
>>62507812
>>62507820
pitbulls are all trash

62507866
>>62507860
Cope again dogfucker, that's not a pibble.

Dog owners should get put to sleep along with their pets when something like this happens.

62507869
>>62507866
lmao. if you suddenly disappeared, nobody would miss you. in fact it would probably feel better than the alternative honestly

62507875
>>62507411
Granny should sell me that gilf butthole for cash

62507946
>>62507711
>>62507680
>in the 19th century, 95% of women and 90% of men had kids
>in the 21st unmmmmmmm just get excited for your two monitors at work and making 20 dollars an hour as an hr lady, after 10 years you could be making 30 dollars! buy a cat!
You are sick in the head and won't figure out why until you keel over and no one gives a fuck.

62508010
>>62507946
You will never have kids incel.Infact, I don't think anyone on this board should have kids and if any of you do someone should call child protective services.

Does it take a retard to figure out that no one wants to give birth in this current economic shit hellscape? Give an incentive to have kids.

62508023
>>62508010
i am sure indians and africans have terrible birth rates because of le economy

62508055
>>62507752
This doesn't address your point. I'm talking about the American enconmy.

62508060
>>62508010
You will have just as many descendents as the incels you so despise. Your legacy will be identical and forgettable. And in your place, ten African families will be imported.

62508074
>>62507680
It's not about sex after a while, but companionship.
Any old single woman in her 30s or 40s will say they have no one to support them when they're actually in need, like a surgery or accident.

62508076
>>62507495
I've heard many complain about vet bills and how one could even make them homeless.

62508084
>>62507635
Anything to distract from the jews

62508091
>>62507635
In my country, it's totally legal to attack and kill rabid dogs. Illegal to eat them though it was OK in the not-so-distant past.

item.title: I bought $150k worth of Microsoft for $369 — 53 replies — 11.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
I bought $150k worth of Microsoft for $369

Open thread • Replies: 53 • Updated: 2026-07-22 06:42 UTC

OP

AMA, My entire net worth is now all in Microsoft.

Early replies (first 3)

62500476
>>62500393
kek baggie

62500481
>>62500393
>what is diversification

62500509
>>62500393
Where did you come from? Did you have a super concentrated portfolio before you went 100%?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62503067
>>62500875
>playing the game of the decade on a shitbox
i'll wait for it to release on pc so I can play it with 4k raytracing on my 5090

62503233
>>62500393
Godspeed

62503312
>>62500835
You’re based

62503383
>>62500393
Do you get to dictate policies now?

62503624
>>62501060
You only didn't buy because Roaring Kitty didn't buy, you're a stupid sheep.

62503625
>>62503170
LMAO, if you still haven't bought microsoft anyone with money is laughing at you.

62503686
>>62500834
kek

62503740
>>62500393
>1pbtid
You could’ve at least mentioned the recent AMD partnership, retard

62503759
>>62503740
Irrelevant stupid

62503827
>>62503759
>AMD
>Irrelevant
Imagine not owning MSFT and AMD stock years ago like I already have

62503903
>>62500393
you own exactly nothing, sell it while still have buyers

62503918
>>62503903
If you own any stock or crypto you're a horrible person

62503927
>>62500481
Its insurance against ignorance. All the great investors dont diversify, its a meme for brainlets. Have fun retiring in 30 years with your cucked index funds

62503936
>>62500847
>a 5% yield
?

62504004
>>62503927
You don't want to earn greater returns than that, you're stupid.

Enjoy making 1000% returns and then jumping off a cliff because you have no idea what to do with your money.

62504005
>>62503936
It's P/E was 20 when I bought it.

62504020
>>62500393
>>62500847
Were you influenced by me earlier this year? I’m MUmommy anon. Full ported into MU in January and was screaming at the top of my lungs in smg once we hit heavy turbulence. I remember some anon giving me (yous) saying that they should be doing shit like this. A $100k or more in a single stock.

62504032
>>62503903
Billy dont even have a property in USA

62504035
>>62504020
Wasn't me but that is something i would say

62504048
>>62500393
>What is gambling?
Are you an insider?
No?
Then you are just gambling anon, if you don't have any exit strategy in place and you didn't do any extensive research.. You are better off going to a casino and playing blackjack.

62504074
>>62504020
>>62504035
Checking my ID get. Well I was there before GME went 50x. I’ve held crypto parabolas. PLTR saved my port in 2024-25 when it became a 30 bagger. So I started to ask myself, if I’ve held through all these huge moves, then wtf haven’t I made it yet? And I realized that there were a couple of problems. 1) I didn’t have enough initial exposure. You need to go in big to get paid out big. So at least $10-25k because $25k turning into a tenbagger is $250k. That’s enough to buy a house, whether or not you actually want one. 2) selling too soon, or just because you are up, or because you’re afraid it will fall. I should have sold 10% at a time every time I felt like selling. Keeps going up from there? Good, I still have more. Starts to fall? Good, at least I sold some at the top. I’ve learned you’re never going to sell the top, so selling all of it at once just makes sure you make a mistake.
Anyways MU looked like the ticket in January and it played out. Now, I’m not so sure. Things are very shaky. Maybe it is time for the hyperfaggers to shine, maybe it isn’t. But it’s not clear enough for me to go all in one of them. Good luck to you.
But if it actually starts falling, cut your loses and get out. You don’t want to become a baggie.

62504153
I think that's great. I bought like close to 50 shares at that about same price and we're doing good. Just don't get greedy when it goes to like 450 500 start selling off chunks taking profits moving them into safer broad index ETFs. But all the analysts seem to agree for what it's worth this things projections in the high 400 range to low 600 range.

62504181
>>62502286
Your feelings are right. Somehow you've gicen custody of your financial future to 1 (one) company. This is what economists and psychologists call "retarded". One reason I still visit /biz/ is because it is a comedic hurtbox of people who keep trapping their entire net worth in single stocks. This board attracts retards like shit attracts flies. Blind to risk at the time of purchase. Sunk cost effect kicks in at the drawdowns, and the human 'doubles down', because he 'is right'. Many such cases ... well, at least you're in Microshart. Could be worse. Others here choose to let their future be decided by single individuals like vitalik and sirgay. It's like a coinflip but worse. Diversification is not a meme. Risk aversion is not a meme. Your 'best company' can go -40% in a day because of circumstance. -30% in a day has happened to me many times. But when you have 80 conpanies instead of 1, that drawdown just gets written off and you can sell without emotion. Enjoy bagholding and begging for microsoft to perform. Or sell and diversify.

62504541
I took a quick 360 to 400 pump and dump, but only 2% port aside from what im already exposed to in etfs. All in is crazy but you can probably get out at 420 or higher within a few months

62505033
>>62504048
You're the one who never does any research.

62507818
>>62505033
if it so profitable why THEY want sell future profits?

62507849
>>62500481
spbp by a wide margin

62507859
>>62500875
anyone with a modicum of self respect will wait a year for the game to get released on PC and actually have a decent experience.
Shitbox cucks will cry out in pain as they get to play with 2FPS.

62508050
>>62500393
Learn to diversify. Should have put more than half of that in AI/Power datacentres - Broadcom and Vertiv are the next fast risers.
